mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.status as role_status, ue.ent_code, e.ent_name, e.social_credit_code, e.parent_code from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_user_ent ue on ue.user_id = u.user_id left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = ue.ent_code
mapper.select:
select u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.user_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark from sys_user u inner join sys_user_ent ue on ue.user_id = u.user_id where u.del_flag = '0'
and ue.ent_code in
#{entCode}
order by u.user_id

select u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.user_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark from sys_user u where u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0'
and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_ent e1 inner join sys_user_ent e2 on e2.ent_code = e1.ent_code and e2.user_id = #{userId} where e1.user_id = u.user_id )
order by u.user_id
select user_id, user_name from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, phonenumber from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_id, user_name, nick_name, email, avatar, phonenumber, sex, password, status, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phonenumber}, #{sex}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select: select user_id, user_name, nick_name, email, phonenumber, status, create_time from sys_user where del_flag = '0'
